install_list.json_shape: Array<{ id, environment, site, product, majorVersion, appVersion, status }>
install_list.normalized_to: { installationId, environment, site, apps, version, status }
install_list.evidence: live authenticated `forge install list --json` returned the documented JSON array

webtrigger_list.reason: no --json flag; `forge webtrigger list --help` exposes only -f/-s/-p/-e. Box-drawing table scrape retained as the only surface.

dedup.cjs_entrypoint_uses_json_directly: scripts/check-rovo-visibility.cjs (CommonJS; cannot import the ESM lib, but now parses `forge install list --json`)
